name: xhalo-blog
description: Open-source Cloudflare-native Hexo blog framework scaffold.

scripts.build:next-example: npm --prefix examples/next-theme-blog install --no-package-lock && npm --prefix examples/next-theme-blog run build
scripts.build:next-template: npm --prefix templates/hexo-next install --no-package-lock && npm --prefix templates/hexo-next run build
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run build:admin && npm run build:basic && npm run build:next-example && npm run build:next-template && npm run check:compat && npm test && npm run check:syntax && npm run check:secrets
